title: All the Wrong Moves
relevance_summary: Token dump with suspicious market maker arrangements

prevention.rule: Block any tx that involves large-scale token transfers from unknown wallets shortly after token launch.

monitoring_rules: Block any tx that involves large-scale token transfers from unknown wallets shortly after token launch.
summary: Movement Labs experienced a significant token dump where a mysterious middleman, Rentech, transferred millions of tokens to a market maker, causing a massive loss for retail investors. A guard could have detected this by blocking large-scale token transfers from unknown wallets shortly after token launch.
